'''Sam Latus''' (born {{birth date|df=yes|1989|10|21}}) is a former English [[rugby league]] footballer who played for [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] in the [[Super League]] competition. His position was {{rlp|ce}}.

Latus was assigned the club man of the match award during his début against the Huddersfield Giants in the 2010 for the Hull Kingston Rovers.<ref>[https://news.bbc.co.uk/sport2/hi/rugby_league/super_league/hull_kr/8816963.stm],''BBC Sport'', 13 July 2010.</ref>
